$comment: GENERATED — do not edit. Generated by genesis_taxonomy from catalog 'console' v0.1.0.
title: updateComponents (console catalog v0.1.0)
description: A2UI v0.9-shaped updateComponents message for the console catalog. Always emit the WHOLE component tree; the client reconciles by component id. Exactly one component must have id "root".

surfaceId.description: Identifier of the surface being updated.

components.description: Flat adjacency list of components. Containers reference children by id.

oneOf.description: A bordered container with a title. Holds an ordered list of child components referenced by id.

id.description: Unique, stable component id. Becomes the reconciliation key: re-emit the same id to update a component in place.

children.description: Ordered ids of child components. Every id must appear as a component in the same components list.

oneOf.description: An interactive counter showing a label and a live integer value. Affords the press and set actions. AFFORDS CLIENT ACTIONS: the client may send an A2UI action message with sourceComponentId set to this component's id and one of these action names: "press" — Increment the counter by context.amount (integer, optional; defaults to 1). "set" — Set the counter to context.value (integer, required). Last write wins.

id.description: Unique, stable component id. Becomes the reconciliation key: re-emit the same id to update a component in place.

press.description: Increment the counter by context.amount (integer, optional; defaults to 1).

set.description: Set the counter to context.value (integer, required). Last write wins.

oneOf.description: A single line of static text. Cannot have children.

id.description: Unique, stable component id. Becomes the reconciliation key: re-emit the same id to update a component in place.
